title: Earth Evolution Simulator
description: A scenario-driven simulation game where players guide a planet through evolutionary eras by making tradeoffs over time.
longDescription: Earth Evolution Simulator is a scenario-driven simulation game where players guide a planet through distinct evolutionary eras. The experience uses stateful decision-making, random events, and path-dependent consequences to steer the planet toward different outcomes. A Python Flask backend maintains game state in session and records run data in SQLite, while the custom engine tracks planetary variables and deferred triggers.
description_business: An interactive simulation platform built around path-dependent decision-making and state tracking.
longDescription_business: Earth Evolution Simulator turns planetary ecology and resource allocation into an interactive simulation. The application uses stateful gameplay, dynamic events, and simple telemetry to model decision-making over time. It runs on a Python Flask backend with SQLite for run history and persistence.

title: ISS Live Location Tracker
description: A real-time International Space Station tracker that shows the station position with location context.
longDescription: Built on the FastAPI framework, this application polls a public API for the current latitude and longitude of the ISS. When the station is over land, it uses geopy and Nominatim to reverse-geocode a readable location. When it is over water, it falls back to an offline KD-tree lookup for the nearest landmass and uses cached NASA imagery for the daily background.
description_business: A real-time tracking application for showing the ISS position with location context.
longDescription_business: The ISS Live Location Tracker polls a public API for the station position and resolves location details when the ISS is over land. It uses geopy for reverse geocoding and an offline fallback database for broader location context when needed. NASA imagery is cached for the daily background so the page stays responsive.

title: MetaWipe
description: A privacy-first mobile app that removes metadata from photos locally before sharing.
longDescription: MetaWipe removes EXIF metadata from images locally by decoding selected files in Dart isolates and rebuilding them into a fresh JPEG or PNG container. The app runs offline, does not require network permission, and keeps the workflow on device from start to finish.
description_business: A privacy-focused mobile application that removes metadata from images locally before sharing.
longDescription_business: MetaWipe is a lightweight mobile utility that strips EXIF metadata from images on-device. The app decodes images into raw pixels in Dart isolates and rebuilds them into a fresh container without hidden metadata. It runs offline and does not require network access.

title: PaintMix AI
description: A camera-based paint mixing assistant that estimates matching paint proportions.
longDescription: PaintMix AI uses a device camera to sample a target color and estimate paint proportions from inventory. It converts RGB inputs into XYZ and CIELAB spaces and uses Delta E distance checks to compare possible mixes. Inventory data is stored locally with SQLite so the workflow stays fast and offline-friendly.
description_business: A camera-based color mixing assistant that helps estimate matching paint ratios.
longDescription_business: PaintMix AI uses the device camera to sample a target color and estimate paint proportions from inventory. It converts RGB inputs to XYZ and CIELAB spaces and uses Delta E distance checks to compare possible mixes. Inventory data is stored locally with SQLite so the workflow stays fast and offline-friendly.

title: RAG Lab
description: Interactive document search and chat powered by a custom RAG engine. Upload PDFs, search semantically, and get grounded answers with citations.
longDescription: RAG Lab is a full-stack Retrieval-Augmented Generation platform built from scratch. Documents are uploaded, parsed, and chunked, then indexed via pgvector for hybrid search (semantic + keyword). A self-hosted Ollama instance generates embeddings locally, and the platform supports pluggable LLM providers (OpenAI, Gemini, Anthropic) for grounded chat responses. Built with FastAPI, Next.js, Supabase, and PostgreSQL RLS for multi-tenant isolation.
description_business: A production-ready RAG engine that lets teams upload documents and ask natural-language questions with citation-grounded answers.
longDescription_business: RAG Lab is a Retrieval-Augmented Generation platform. It ingests documents (PDF, Markdown, text), chunks them intelligently, and indexes them with both semantic vectors and keyword search. Users can search across their indexed documents or chat with them via streaming LLM responses. The platform supports multi-tenant isolation, custom prompt templates, per-tenant LLM key management, and encrypted credential storage.

title: PrateeqSync AI: Intelligent Portfolio & Resume Automation Engine
description: A local content manager for portfolio metadata, credential review, and generated resume copy.
longDescription: PrateeqSync AI is a Streamlit-based content manager for portfolio data, certificates, and blog posts. It syncs to Supabase, keeps local JSON fallbacks in step, and uses Gemini for OCR and content assistance where needed. The workflow is built for local editing, review, and controlled publishing.
description_business: A local content manager for updating portfolio data, certificates, and blog posts.
longDescription_business: PrateeqSync AI is a Streamlit-based content manager for portfolio data, certificates, and blog posts. It syncs to Supabase, keeps local JSON fallbacks in step, and uses Gemini for OCR and content assistance where needed. The workflow is built for local editing, review, and controlled publishing.
